updates.title: New labour laws: Do changes impact your in-hand salary and tax regime? We ask experts…

updates.title: A car lease in CTC helps reduce your tax outgo. Here's how
updates.summary: Car lease fits within the definition of wages under the new labour codes, unlike HRA, LTA, or variable pay, which makes it easier for employers to include it as part of overall compensation.

updates.title: ITR filing 2026: 9 deductions salaried individuals can avail to reduce capital gains tax
